items.text:
ABU TRICA PLEADS NOT GUILTY IN US COURT. ⚖️

Ghanaian socialite Abu Trica — real name Frederick Kumi — stood before a US federal judge on Friday and entered his plea: not guilty.

US prosecutors allege he was part of a network that used AI tools to create fake identities and defraud elderly Americans of more than $8 million in romance scams. He was flown out of Accra in the early hours of Thursday after the High Court approved his extradition on July 2. He had been in custody since December.

The charges: conspiracy to commit wire fraud and money laundering conspiracy — up to 20 years in prison if convicted. His trial is set for September 8.

Abu Trica denies all the charges.

(Source: US Department of Justice | GhanaWeb | GBC)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #AbuTrica #GhanaNews

What do you make of this case? 👇

Ghanaian socialite Abu Trica (Frederick Kumi) has pleaded not guilty in a US federal court over an alleged $8m romance scam targeting elderly Americans. Trial set for Sept 8. He faces up to 20 years if convicted. (Source: DOJ/GhanaWeb) #GreaterNews #Ghana #AbuTrica

THE WORLD CUP SEMIFINALS ARE SET — AND IT'S A CLASSIC LINEUP. ⚽🔥

Argentina vs England. Spain vs France. Four heavyweights left standing.

Jude Bellingham scored TWICE as England beat Norway 2-1 in extra time. Then Julián Álvarez struck in the 112th minute as defending champions Argentina survived another scare, beating Switzerland 3-1 after extra time.

Argentina and England renew one of football's most famous rivalries on Wednesday in Atlanta — and yes, that's the same England side from Ghana's group stage.

(Source: ESPN | CNN | NPR)
#GreaterNews #Ghana #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup2026

Chale, who lifts the trophy from these four? 🏆👇

World Cup semis are set: Argentina vs England on Wednesday in Atlanta, Spain vs France in the other. Bellingham hit twice in England's 2-1 win over Norway; Álvarez sank Switzerland 3-1 in extra time. (Source: ESPN/CNN) #GreaterNews #FIFAWorldCup ⚽

TYPHOON BAVI SLAMS EASTERN CHINA — 1.7 MILLION EVACUATED.

Typhoon Bavi made landfall in the coastal city of Taizhou late Saturday night, with winds of about 144 km/h.

More than 1.7 million people were moved to safety across Zhejiang province before the storm hit. Over 100,000 more were evacuated in neighbouring Fujian, and about 34,000 in Shanghai.

Bavi had earlier battered Japan's southern islands and Taiwan. It is the second typhoon to strike China in a single week, after Maysak.

(Source: Al Jazeera | AP | CNBC)
#GreaterNews #TyphoonBavi #China #WorldNews

What's your message to those in the storm's path? 🙏

Typhoon Bavi has hit eastern China at Taizhou after more than 1.7 million people were evacuated in Zhejiang province. Winds near 144 km/h at landfall — the second typhoon to strike China in a week. (Source: Al Jazeera/AP) #GreaterNews #TyphoonBavi #China
